response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content: The entire 4:30 video is a static image displaying the VTuber Kureiji Ollie with the text 'Crazy:になるほど 恋してる ZOMBIE' overlayed. Performed a web search for this exact phrase to find song details and lyrics. The search did not yield an official song title match, suggesting it might be a specific phrase or stylized title not indexed with lyrics as a separate song. Therefore, identified the song title from the on-screen text as 'Crazy:になるほど 恋してる ZOMBIE' and the performer as Kureiji Ollie. Set reference_lyrics_og and reference_lyrics_en to null since they could not be reliably found.
response.global_summary: A 4-minute 30-second video featuring a static illustration of the VTuber Kureiji Ollie with the text 'Crazy:になるほど 恋してる ZOMBIE' displayed throughout, likely indicating the song title.
